description: _classify_entry treats repos absent from repo_pr_loaded (no fetch attempted, e.g. modal-only agents) the same as repos that explicitly failed to fetch (value=False). The condition `repo_pr_loaded.get(agent_repo) is not True` returns True both when the repo has value=False and when the repo is not in the dict at all. This causes agents with a 'remote' label but no local cwd (modal-hosted) to be incorrectly classified as PRS_FAILED instead of STILL_COOKING.
